hooks.prompt: Read .agent-memory/session-summary.md and .agent-memory/identity/soul.md silently. Apply the identity settings. Only report to the user if there are warnings (declining quality scores, unresolved critical patterns, or scaling thresholds exceeded). If session-summary.md has open items, mention them briefly. Keep output under 10 lines. If .agent-memory/ does not exist, say nothing.

Check if meaningful work was done this session. If yes: (1) Update .agent-memory/session-summary.md with completed work, open items, and next steps — max 30 lines, overwrite not append. (2) Check if any coding iterations (bug fixes, implementations) were completed but not logged to .agent-memory/iterations/iteration-log.md — if so, log them briefly. If nothing meaningful was done (just a chat or quick question), skip silently.
